title: Find My Device - Main screen
scenario: Find My Device main screen displays map and headset list after navigating from App Menu with connected headset
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth headset is connected to the phone.
3. Tap the App Menu (hamburger icon or three-dot menu) in the top-left or top-right corner of the Home screen.
4. Select 'Find My Device' from the menu.
5. If prompted, grant location access permission to the app.
6. Observe the main Find My Device screen that appears.
expected: The main Find My Device screen displays a map showing the current location of the connected headset, along with a list of connected and/or disconnected headsets.
